requirement_topic.en: Import Conformity and Product Approval — IANORQ / INACOM interface
requirement_topic.zh: 进出口合格与产品准入——IANORQ / INACOM 协同
requirement_topic.zht: 進出口合格與產品准入——IANORQ / INACOM 協同

summary.en: Angola applies a conformity and market-entry process led by IANORQ where applicable, aligned to adopted IEC standards for quality and safety classes. For regulated categories, import inspection is applied on entry and only compliant consignments are cleared. Wireless or radio-enabled battery accessories and charging accessories should be checked against INACOM telecom requirements. Practical market entry usually requires an in-country importer to act as the Angola-facing compliance point, with Portuguese documentation and declarations aligned to local customs workflow at ports such as Luanda and Lobito.
summary.zh: 安哥拉对相关产品采用由 IANORQ 牵头、以采用 IEC 标准为基础的合格与准入流程。对于受监管品类，海关会实施入境检验，不合规货物会被卡控。具备无线/射频功能的产品还需按 INACOM 要求进行对应检查。实际通关通常需要当地进口商作为安哥拉对口主体，并使用葡语文件及声明，按诸如罗安达和洛比托等港口的通关流程处理。
summary.zht: 安哥拉對相關產品採用由 IANORQ 牽頭、以採用 IEC 標準為基礎的合格與准入流程。對於受監管品類，海關會實施入境檢驗，不合規貨物會被卡控。具備無線/射頻功能的產品還需按 INACOM 要求進行對應檢查。實際通關通常需要當地進口商作為安哥拉對口主體，並使用葡語文件及聲明，按如羅安達與洛比托等港口的通關流程處理。

standards_or_laws: IANORQ imported-product conformity framework (Angola national standards implementation aligned to adopted IEC norms)
INACOM requirements for telecom and radio-related products

summary.en: China uses domestic export and product safety regimes such as GB safety standards and customs export controls. While these support domestic compliance, they are not a substitute for Angola-specific entry and local importer workflows. In practice, China-side GB/CCC documentation is often necessary for Chinese sales and quality governance but does not by itself satisfy Angola market-entry expectations when the goods are physically placed in Angola.
summary.zh: 中国主要是按国内安全与出入境管理规则处理锂电产品，如 GB 标准体系和出入境报关流程。这些文件对中国境内市场和出口物流有支持作用，但不能替代安哥拉本地进口准入和监管流程。实际中，来自中国的 GB/CCC 资料通常用于国内合规或质量治理，但不必然足以满足安哥拉进境与市场准入要求。
summary.zht: 中國主要是按國內安全與進出口管理規則處理鋰電產品，如 GB 標準體系和進出口報關流程。這些文件對中國境內市場及物流有支援作用，但不能替代安哥拉本地進口准入和監管流程。實際中，來自中國的 GB/CCC 資料通常用於國內合規或品質治理，但不必然足以滿足安哥拉進境與市場准入要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment
China customs and export management notices for dangerous goods and regulated electronics

gap.en: The main gap is not a test-method gap but a market-entry governance gap: Angola expects an IANORQ-linked import-conformity path with in-country interface and local documentation, while China-side compliance does not map one-to-one to Angola customs inspection and importer obligations. Exporters should therefore pair technical safety evidence with an Angolan importer partner process and Portuguese-facing commercial records.
gap.zh: 主要差距不在测试方案本身，而在市场准入治理流程：安哥拉要求基于 IANORQ 的入境合格流程、当地对口主体与文件链路，而中国侧合规不能与之一一对应。出口商应将技术安全证据与安哥拉进口商本地化流程及葡语商业文件绑定。
gap.zht: 主要差距不在測試方案本身，而在市場准入治理流程：安哥拉要求基於 IANORQ 的入境合格流程、當地對口主體與文件鏈路，而中國側合規不能與之一一對應。出口商應將技術安全證據與安哥拉進口商本地化流程及葡語商務文件綁定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory market entry requirement for regulated imports under the practical Angola workflow and customs inspection process, with in-country importer coordination and language/document controls.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic safety regime and export handling, but not equivalent to Angola import-conformity process requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese exporter should assume Angola market entry is importer-led and cannot be based on China-side compliance alone. Prepare IANORQ-linked conformity mapping and Portuguese documents early, especially for regulated and radio-enabled product variants.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国出口商应按安哥拉市场入场是当地进口商主导的原则处理，不能仅依赖中国侧合规文件。应及早准备与 IANORQ 流程对应的合规映射及葡语文件，特别是受监管品类和无线功能产品。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國出口商應按安哥拉市場入場是當地進口商主導的原則處理，不能僅依賴中國側合規文件。應及早準備與 IANORQ 流程對應的合規映射及葡語文件，特別是受監管品類和無線功能產品。
